function:src/openhuman/memory_store/content/read.rs:stage_summary(
            &cfg.memory_tree_content_root(),
            &SummaryComposeInput {
                summary_id: &node.id,
                tree_kind: SummaryTreeKind::Source,
                tree_id: &tree.id,
                tree_scope: &tree.scope,
                level: node.level,
                child_ids: &node.child_ids,
                child_basenames: None,
                child_count: node.child_ids.len(),
                time_range_start: node.time_range_start,
                time_range_end: node.time_range_end,
                sealed_at: node.sealed_at,
                body: &node.content,
            },
            "slack-eng",
        ).unwrap

function:src/openhuman/memory_store/kv.rs:conn.execute(
            "INSERT INTO kv_namespace (namespace, key, value_json, updated_at)
             VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4)
             ON CONFLICT(namespace, key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = excluded.value_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at",
            params![
                Self::sanitize_namespace(namespace),
                key,
                sanitized_value.value.to_string(),
                Self::now_ts()
            ],
        ).map_err

function:src/openhuman/memory_store/memory_trait.rs:self.upsert_document(NamespaceDocumentInput {
            namespace: ns,

            priority: "medium".to_string(),

            metadata: json!({}),

        })
        .await
        .map(|_| ()).map_err

function:src/openhuman/memory_store/memory_trait.rs:conn
            .query_row(
                "SELECT document_id, key, content, updated_at, category, taint
                 FROM memory_docs WHERE namespace = ?1 AND key = ?2 LIMIT 1",
                params![ns, key],
                |row| {
                    Ok((
                        row.get(0)?,
                        row.get(1)?,
                        row.get(2)?,
                        row.get(3)?,
                        row.get(4)?,
                        row.get(5)?,
                    ))
                },
            ).optional

function:src/openhuman/memory_store/memory_trait.rs:conn.execute(
                "INSERT INTO memory_docs (
                    document_id, namespace, key, title, content, source_type,
                    priority, tags_json, metadata_json, category, session_id,
                    created_at, updated_at, markdown_rel_path
                 ) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, 'chat', 'medium', '[]', '{}', 'core', NULL, 0.0, 0.0, '')",
                params![
                    "legacy-doc-1",
                    GLOBAL_NAMESPACE,
                    "ns_x/real_key",
                    "ns_x/real_key",
                    "legacy value"
                ],
            ).unwrap
